name: Mount Redoubt
eruptionHistory: Major eruptions in 1902, 1966, 1989-90, and 2009. The 1989 eruption caused a KLM 747 to lose all four engines.
description: Mount Redoubt is a prominent stratovolcano on the western side of Cook Inlet. Its eruptions pose significant hazards to aviation and the Kenai Peninsula.
